name: Pelindung Seorang Puteri
overview: Rose who went away from her family after being slandered because she was often followed by the mysterious settler even though she herself was not sure about the identity of the mysterious settler. Is it Firdaus, her ex-boyfriend who is still in love with her, Saiful, her childhood friend or Hazril, a good friend of Rose's older brother who is quietly interested in her from afar. Who will be Rose's protector from further harassment by the mysterious settler?
